original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: Tear Film & Ocular Surface Society Dry Eye Workshop II Diagnostic Methodology Subcommittee
original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: TFOS DEWS II Diagnostic Methodology report
original_registry_entry.population: People undergoing dry-eye symptom screening, diagnosis, subtype assessment, differential diagnosis, or monitoring.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Ocular-surface symptom assessment and eye-care diagnostic evaluation.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for selected dry-eye symptom, diagnostic-test, ocular-surface, eyelid, and contact-lens context. It does not support primary-care autonomous diagnosis, treatment, medicine, referral urgency, fixed follow-up, or UAE service pathways.

exact_sections.heading: Clinical protocol for the dry-eye diagnostic test battery
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports dry-eye symptom screening, visual symptoms, tear-film tests, fluorescein or lissamine staining, and cornea, conjunctiva, or eyelid-margin observation without inferring diagnosis from symptoms alone.

exact_sections.heading: Ocular-surface damage and eyelid assessment
exact_sections.locator: Sections 6.6 and 6.8; official report lines 327–365 and 402–463
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-observed corneal, conjunctival, eyelid, and fluorescein-staining documentation in dry-eye evaluation.

exact_sections.heading: Differential diagnosis, visual asthenopia, and contact lenses
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports screen-related visual discomfort, pain or photophobia as differential context, and contact-lens-associated dry-eye context without treatment instructions.

title: TFOS DEWS II Diagnostic Methodology report
publisher: Tear Film & Ocular Surface Society Dry Eye Workshop II Diagnostic Methodology Subcommittee
population: People undergoing dry-eye symptom screening, diagnosis, subtype assessment, differential diagnosis, or monitoring.
intended_setting: Ocular-surface symptom assessment and eye-care diagnostic evaluation.
